source: Closed PUC order wrapper carrier pack drafted from retained PUC public-order fixtures and source-only oracle reviews.
purpose: Constrain public utility commission order compiles to recurring wrapper anatomy: agency, docket/proceeding id, order kind, issue date, and compact current disposition. This pack does not attempt settlement terms, findings, votes, service lists, or ordering-paragraph substance.

lenses.purpose: PUC order/resolution wrapper, issuing agency, proceeding or docket id, order kind, issue date, and compact current disposition.

predicates.notes: Identifies one source-stated PUC order, resolution, ruling, proposed decision, notice, or memorializing decision. Do not hide settlement terms, findings, ordering paragraphs, votes, certificate-of-service rows, party rosters, or full captions in wrapper slots.
